data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for processing state transitions (pending, processing, published, failed, dead-letter). However, the evidence provided does not confirm that all necessary state transitions are being handled as required. The linked use case mentions the dead letter queue but does not provide evidence of the other states being processed, indicating a gap in the expected behavior.
gaps: No evidence of handling all required state transitions (pending, processing, published, failed).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
